During the the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], at some point between [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] and [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], [[Osarian]] was '''attacked''' by the [[Red Knights of Life]].

==History==
After their first [[Battle of Osarian|assault]] on [[Osarian]] was defeated by [[Wurth Skidder]], the [[Anti-droid sentiment/Legends|technophobic]] [[Red Knights of Life]], an allied group of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders who hated any form of mechanical technology, launched a second attack on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

However, the Red Knights were repelled by the [[Iron Knight]]s.<ref name="Droids" />

{{Battle-stub}}
